title: Thane Interactions Record (v1)
description: Canonical normalized record shape for the interactions/ corpus. The interactions normalizer (#938) populates this schema; until then this file is a placeholder declaring the planned shape so future consumers can target it.

event_id.description: UUIDv7 identifier, unique across all interactions records

kind.description: message = conversational turn; session = session-level summary; wake = non-conversational trigger that produced a request/response

source.description: Originating era / corpus, e.g. thane, thane_legacy, openclaw_docker, openclaw_vm

source_ref.description: Deterministic back-link to the pristine origin record (typically a path under sources/ plus an event_id anchor)

speaker.description: Who produced this record's content (for kind=message and kind=wake)

trigger.description: For kind=wake: the wake source, e.g. mqtt, email_poll, schedule, channel_inbound

metadata.description: Free bag for any ranking signal or auxiliary fields
